other_observers: J Dan Brooke, who photographed the bird.; I am the original observer.
description: Finch-like, but smaller than house finches in yard at the same time. Red cap and pink breast with small yellowish bill obvious. Prominent black highlights around eye and bill. Broad flank streaks excluded Hoary Redpoll. Broad white wing bars. Photographed.Behaviors: We had been out. Came home and bird appeared on our tube finch feeder, which had a mix of sunflower chips and niger seed. Bird was single, unusual to us as all the birds we've seen this winter have been in flocks of various sizes. Remained in yard for about 10 minutes, spent entire time on feeder, then left, not to be seen again by us.Call: NonePlumage: Adult
photographer: Photographer: J Dan Brooke, J Dan Brooke
